_meta.purpose: Market and application knowledge layer for Marion, distilled from Freudenberg Sealing Technologies brochures. Captures, per industry: the conditions that drive seal selection, the seal types deployed, the relevant materials, and a cross-link to Fluidseal/SSG product-group families. Helps Marion reason about WHERE seals go and WHY, so it can guide an application before any part-number cross-reference exists.
_meta.not_a_crossref: This file is descriptive market context, NOT a parent-profile or part-number mapping. fluidseal_groups lists which Fluidseal/SSG product-group families typically serve the market; it is a routing hint, not a verified equivalent.
_meta.companion: materials-context.json (material envelopes referenced by material key)

aerospace.summary: High-altitude, extreme-temperature, multi-fluid environment (fuels, de-icing fluids, hydrocarbons, synthetic solvents) with zero tolerance for seal failure.
drivers: Extreme heat and cold with rapid fluctuation

agriculture.summary: Heavy mobile equipment facing contaminants, long peak-season run times, and -40C to 250C swings; downtime during planting/harvest is costly.

construction.summary: Harsh-weather earthmoving and infrastructure equipment; UV, contaminants, high pressures up to 800 bar in hydraulics, emissions compliance.

fluid_power.summary: Core hydraulics/pneumatics: smaller components, higher pressures, hotter ambients, diverse fluids. The heart of Fluidseal's catalog.
drivers: Rising operating pressure (to 500 bar accumulators, 170 bar peak shaft seals)

fluid_handling.summary: Pumps, valves, and flow systems for water infrastructure, power generation, and process manufacturing; contamination and leak prevention central.

material_handling.summary: Forklifts, cranes, and logistics equipment needing long maintenance intervals, high power density, and contaminant resistance.

power_transmission.summary: Gearboxes and couplings; emphasis on the full tribological system (shaft prep + seal + lubrication) for long life and low friction.

railway.summary: Metro/light-rail/HSR; extreme temperature span (-60C to +80C), safety-critical braking, passenger comfort, emissions reduction.

e_mobility.summary: Electric and hybrid vehicle sealing: battery protection, electrically-conductive shaft seals to bleed shaft currents, thermal management.

diesel.summary: Industrial/marine/stationary diesel engines (16,000+ standard products): sealing plus vibration control across all engine components.

metal_processing.summary: Iron/steel and metal production lines (casters, strand guides) under extremely adverse heat, water, and scale conditions.

power_tools.summary: Handheld and outdoor power equipment (rotary hammers, nail guns, chain saws, pressure cleaners, mowers): compact, wear/heat-resistant, PAH-compliant.

recreational.summary: Powersports (snowmobiles, marine, ATV, motorcycle): operate across temperature/altitude/depth extremes with low-friction, lightweight priorities.

medical.summary: Medical device and healthcare equipment: efficiency, cleanliness, and approvals for an aging-demographic-driven market.

safety.summary: Seals/components for safety technology, drawing on 1,700+ compounds with relevant approvals; material-led market.

chemical.summary: Chemical process plants: near-universal media resistance required across PTFE plastics and high-performance elastomers; structured by process-plant schematic.

food_beverage.summary: Bottling and food processing: CIP/SIP resistance, steam to ~145C, prevention of aroma transfer, food-contact approvals.

pharmaceutical.summary: Pharma process: highest purity, extractables/leachables control, USP Class VI / FDA approvals, traceability marking, wide temp incl. cryogenic.

process_industry_drive_shafts.summary: Rotating drive-shaft sealing in process plants; selection by pressure/speed/temperature/medium with a dedicated product ladder.

industrial_presses.summary: Metal-forming, particle-board, and pipe-forming presses: very large plungers under high pressure with slow strokes.

injection_molding.summary: Injection molding machine hydraulics: fast-stroke clamp cylinders with strong oil wetting, needing inter-seal pressure relief.
seal_types: primary seal with pressure relief (Omegat OMS-MR PR)
